title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates how Claude Code was used to build a $481,000 annual revenue product in 45 days with a non-technical founder. He outlines five actionable steps: problem-first shipping, strategic code generation vs reuse, learning technical vocabulary, deliberate pacing, and proactive debugging. The approach enabled scaling to over 100,000 users.
